---
name: Incorrect data report
about: Some data is incorrect, like honing costs
title: ''
labels: Incorrect data

---

**Describe the data error**
A clear and concise description of what is incorrect.

**Correct data**
A clear and concise description of what the relevant data should have been.

**Data source**
A description of where the correct data came from (e.g. in-game screenshot)

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here.
